event_title: Scalding at Twitter, LinkedIn, and (+event@) Rackspace
title: Scalding at Twitter, LinkedIn, and (+event@) Rackspace
description: This is a spontaneous holiday event! Ho-ho-ho. Come join the scalding community to learn and discuss cool things Twitter, Linkedin and Rackspace are doing with data and scalding (scala on hadoop). We have a great group of speakers lined up for this event so should be a really interesting set of presentations and discussions. Food and drinks will be provided. Come meet new people and learn what others are doing in the scalding community!
